user.title: Add DHE Connect
user.description: Choose a discovered DHE Connect, scan a subnet, or enter the host manually. Zeroconf/mDNS discoveries only appear when Home Assistant can see the device in the local network.

subnet_scan.title: Subnet scan
subnet_scan.description: Choose how Home Assistant should select the subnet before scanning for DHE Connect. Keep the scan port at 8443 unless the DHE web interface uses a different port.

subnet_scan_network_mask.title: Subnet scan
subnet_scan_network_mask.description: Enter a network address and subnet mask, for example 192.168.1.0 and 255.255.255.0. Use this form instead of CIDR.

subnet_scan_cidr.title: Subnet scan
subnet_scan_cidr.description: Enter a CIDR subnet, for example 192.168.1.0/24. Use this form instead of network address plus subnet mask.

manual.title: Configure DHE connection
manual.description:
{scan_status}

The pairing request starts in the next step.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Confirm discovered DHE Connect
zeroconf_confirm.description: Home Assistant discovered this DHE Connect through Zeroconf/mDNS. Set the physical Tmax jumper position, then continue to pairing. The integration is only created after successful pairing and login.

pairing_confirm.title: Confirm pairing
pairing_confirm.description: Click OK now. The pairing request appears on the DHE afterwards, and confirmation on the device must be completed there. The integration is only created after successful pairing and login.

reauth_confirm.title: Repair DHE pairing
reauth_confirm.description: Click OK now to request a new local pairing token. Confirm the pairing request on the DHE display. The existing integration is reloaded after successful pairing and login.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure DHE Connect
reconfigure.description: Update the DHE host, port, device name and physical Tmax jumper position. If host or port changes, Home Assistant checks that the new target is reachable and preserves the existing local token.

progress.scan_dhe: Searching the selected subnet for DHE Connect

error.pairing_timeout: Pairing was not confirmed on the DHE in time. Please try again.
error.pairing_not_confirmed: Pairing was not confirmed on the DHE. Confirm it on the device and try again.
error.pairing_token_timeout: Pairing was confirmed, but the token could not be retrieved in time.
error.pairing_confirm_after_auth_timeout: Authentication was received, but pairing confirmation on the DHE did not complete in time.
error.pairing_rejected: Pairing was rejected on the DHE. Please confirm it again.
error.auth_failed: Pairing succeeded, but login on the DHE failed.
error.auth_timeout: Authentication on the DHE timed out. Please try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the DHE. Check the IP address and port.
error.invalid_host: Invalid host. Enter only an IP address or hostname, without path, username or port.
error.invalid_scan_subnet_mode: Choose how the subnet should be selected.
error.invalid_setup_mode: Choose a discovered DHE Connect, subnet scan or manual setup.
error.invalid_scan_subnet: Invalid subnet. Use either network address 192.168.1.0 with subnet mask 255.255.255.0, or CIDR 192.168.1.0/24.
error.scan_subnet_too_large: The subnet is too large. Use a smaller private IPv4 subnet, for example 192.168.1.0 with subnet mask 255.255.255.0, or CIDR 192.168.1.0/24.
error.embedded_port_not_supported: Do not include the port in the host field (for example "192.168.1.10"). Enter the port only in the port field.
error.invalid_port: Invalid port. The port must be between 1 and 65535.

abort.already_in_progress: Setup for this DHE Connect is already in progress.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the discovered DHE Connect.
abort.conflicting_discovery_identity: The discovered DHE Connect reported conflicting network identity data.
abort.low_confidence_discovery: The discovered service did not look enough like a DHE Connect.
abort.recently_discovered: This DHE Connect was discovered recently. Start setup manually to use the cached discovery.
abort.invalid_discovery_parameters: The discovered DHE Connect did not provide a valid host or port.
abort.invalid_reauth_entry: The existing DHE Connect entry cannot be reauthenticated.

confirm.title: Repair DHE pairing
confirm.description: Click OK now to request and validate a new local pairing token for **{name}** at `{host}:{port}`. Confirm the pairing request on the DHE display.

abort.entry_not_found: The DHE Connect entry no longer exists.
abort.invalid_entry: The DHE Connect entry has no valid host or port.

confirm.title: Repair DHE pairing
confirm.description: The stored token for **{name}** at `{host}:{port}` is no longer accepted by the DHE. Click OK to request and validate a new local pairing token, then confirm pairing on the DHE display.

abort.entry_not_found: The DHE Connect entry no longer exists.
abort.invalid_entry: The DHE Connect entry has no valid host or port.

device_unreachable.title: DHE device is unreachable
device_unreachable.description: Home Assistant cannot reach **{name}** at `{host}:{port}`. Check power, network routing/firewall and whether the DHE web interface is reachable from the Home Assistant host.

discovery_conflict.title: DHE discovery conflict detected
discovery_conflict.description: Home Assistant detected conflicting discovery identity hints for **{name}**. Use the existing configured entry or complete setup manually by entering a stable host/IP and port.

host_changed_or_unreachable.title: Configured DHE host is unreachable
host_changed_or_unreachable.description: The configured target `{host}:{port}` for **{name}** is unreachable. Verify host/port and network path, then use Reconfigure to correct the target if needed.

init.title: Configure DHE Connect
init.description: Manage connection settings, device, costs, weather favorites or radio stations.

connection.title: Configure connection/device
connection.description: Change IP address, port, device name and physical Tmax jumper position. Host or port changes keep the existing local token and are checked for reachability before saving.

device_settings.title: Costs & emissions
device_settings.description: Set currency, electricity price, water price and CO2 emission on the DHE. Number fields are prefilled with current device values; if available, currency is prefilled from the current device, otherwise it defaults to 'Do not change'.

weather_favorite.title: Search weather favorite
weather_favorite.description: Select a country and search for a location.

weather_favorite_result.title: Select weather favorite
weather_favorite_result.description: Select a result and save it as favorite.

remove_weather_favorite.title: Remove weather favorite
remove_weather_favorite.description: Select an existing favorite and remove it from the DHE.

radio_favorite.title: Select radio search
radio_favorite.description: Search by text, genre, country or city. Genre uses the DHE catalog directly; country and city use catalog selection plus a search term.

radio_favorite_catalog.title: Enter radio search
radio_favorite_catalog.description: Enter a search term and, for country, city or genre, select the matching catalog entry.

radio_favorite_result.title: Select radio station
radio_favorite_result.description: Select a result, save it as favorite and activate it on the DHE.

remove_radio_favorite.title: Remove radio station
remove_radio_favorite.description: Select an existing radio favorite and remove it from the DHE.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the DHE. Check the IP address and port.
error.invalid_host: Invalid host. Enter only an IP address or hostname, without path, username or port.
error.embedded_port_not_supported: Do not include the port in the host field (for example "192.168.1.10"). Enter the port only in the port field.
error.pairing_timeout: Pairing was not confirmed on the DHE in time. Please try again.
error.pairing_not_confirmed: Pairing was not confirmed on the DHE. Confirm it on the device and try again.
error.pairing_token_timeout: Pairing was confirmed, but the token could not be retrieved in time.
error.pairing_confirm_after_auth_timeout: Authentication was received, but pairing confirmation on the DHE did not complete in time.
error.pairing_rejected: Pairing was rejected on the DHE. Please confirm it again.
error.auth_failed: Pairing succeeded, but login on the DHE failed.
error.auth_timeout: Authentication on the DHE timed out. Please try again.
error.invalid_port: Invalid port. The port must be between 1 and 65535.
error.not_loaded: The integration is not loaded yet.
error.no_countries: No weather countries received from the DHE.
error.device_settings_failed: Could not save costs and emissions.
error.no_radio_catalog: No radio catalog received from the DHE.
